title: Hybrid Energy Storage System
description: Designed a hybrid energy system combining batteries and supercapacitors to improve power delivery and efficiency in electric vehicles.

narrative.challenge: Standard battery packs degrade under high-frequency power peaks during EV acceleration and regenerative braking.
narrative.solution: Designed a hybrid system combining batteries and supercapacitors with a real-time energy management strategy to split power demands intelligently.
narrative.impact: Improved power delivery efficiency and extended theoretical battery lifecycle by reducing peak current stress on the main pack.

title: Regenerative Suspension System
description: Developed a system to convert suspension movement into usable electrical energy, improving overall vehicle efficiency.

narrative.challenge: Kinetic energy from road vibrations is completely wasted in conventional passive damper systems.
narrative.solution: Developed a linear electromagnetic generator integrated into the suspension strut assembly, converting vertical oscillations into electrical energy.
narrative.impact: Successfully harvested ancillary power from suspension travel, directly feeding low-voltage onboard systems and improving overall vehicle efficiency.

title: Altitude Hold System
description: Built a control-based system to maintain stable altitude using feedback mechanisms.

narrative.challenge: Maintaining precise altitude stability in the presence of external disturbances and sensor noise.
narrative.solution: Implemented a cascaded PID control loop with complementary filter-based sensor fusion for accurate altitude estimation and correction.
narrative.impact: Achieved stable altitude hold with minimal drift, demonstrating robust feedback control under variable conditions.

title: Z-Bus Matrix Tool
description: Created a computational tool for power system network analysis and impedance calculations.

narrative.challenge: Manual computation of impedance matrices for power system networks is error-prone and time-consuming.
narrative.solution: Built a Python-based computational tool that automates Z-Bus matrix formation using building algorithms for any given network topology.
narrative.impact: Reduced analysis time significantly and provided accurate impedance calculations for fault analysis and power flow studies.
